example.title: Vendor-selection options memo with named dissent
example.inputs: Decision: pick identity-verification vendor for onboarding flow. Options shortlisted: vendor X (incumbent), vendor Y (regional specialist), vendor Z (lowest cost). Decision-maker: CTO. Decision-required-by: 2026-06-30.
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (3 viable options), r2 (cost/value/risk scored), r3 (named decision-maker), r4 (decision-by date), r5 (dissent named with rationale).
